steps.title: Identify the narrowing move
steps.content: The first sentence makes a broad claim: Diker is “well known for his work as a puppeteer.” The second sentence narrows to specify: “he specializes in shadow puppetry.” The transition signals movement from general point to specific detail.

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content:
”In particular” introduces a specific detail when discussing a general topic—here, it clarifies which type of puppetry Diker specializes in.

The other three choices introduce relationships not present in the passage: opposition, consequence, or enumeration.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
